parameters.query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, MAX(ml.logged_at) as last_meal_date, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(ml.logged_at))) / 3600 as hours_since_last_meal FROM users u LEFT JOIN meal_logs ml ON u.id = ml.user_id WHERE u.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.name
